summary: Well‑balanced audience recording that handles adverse conditions admirably.
review: The reviewer praises the excellent balance of the tape and commends the recorder for braving difficult conditions with his gear. No specific comments on the musical performance are given, but the positive tone and four‑star rating indicate overall satisfaction with what was captured.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it rates the recording 4 stars and highlights good balance despite challenges, providing limited insight into show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Extremely good balance noted; recorder managed to capture a clear mix even under adverse conditions. No complaints about noise or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were mentioned in the review.
